ddls:
CREATE TABLE "containers" (
  "container_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each container */,
  "container_name" TEXT /* Name of the container instance */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Current CPU usage percentage */,
  "mem_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage and limit in MiB */,
  "mem_limit" TEXT /* Memory limit in GiB */,
  "mem_percentage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "net_io" TEXT /* Network input/output statistics */,
  "block_io" TEXT /* Block input/output statistics */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  "orchestrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container orchestrator */,
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* ID of the cluster where the container is running */,
  "node_id" TEXT /* ID of the node where the container is running */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the container (e.g., running, stopped, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_orchestrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("orchestrator_id") REFERENCES container_orchestrators ("orchestrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_containers_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "container_orchestrators" (
  "orchestrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orchestrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the orchestrator */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the orchestrator (e.g., Kubernetes, Docker Swarm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orchestrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "container_id" TEXT /* ID of the container related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., CPU usage, memory limit exceeded) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "container_id" TEXT /* ID of the container being monitored */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage recorded at this timestamp */,
  "mem_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage recorded at this timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_history_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "container_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "container_id" TEXT /* ID of the container related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., started, stopped, restarted) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_container_events_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "container_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit entry */,
  "container_id" TEXT /* ID of the container to which limits apply */,
  "cpu_limit" REAL /* CPU limit for the container */,
  "memory_limit" TEXT /* Memory limit for the container */,
  "storage_limit" TEXT /* Storage limit for the container */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., INFO, WARN, ERROR) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed log message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "settings" TEXT /* Settings and configurations of the dashboard in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in JSON format */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
